# tier: # Held-out generalization set for the romaji/ASCII classifier.
# IMPORTANT: train_classifier.py must NEVER load this file. It loads only
# classifier-eval.tsv (by name) as training anchors, so every string here is
# unseen by the model. These cases reuse the *patterns* of classifier-eval.tsv
# with fresh vocabulary, so eval_classifier.py --heldout measures whether the
# model generalizes rather than whether it memorized the anchors.
# Reported informationally (does not gate the build). expected format:
# A:literal|R:literal, A = keep ASCII, R = convert romaji.
